title: Compliance gap: Storage resources must be covered by policy controls
rationale: Every storage resource should be covered by at least one policy control.
decisionsTaken: Detected uncovered resources against compliance rule requirements.

title: Some topology resources are not protected by any security baseline nodes
rationale: Security protection coverage is incomplete for the current topology graph.
decisionsTaken: Compared topology resources against PROTECTS edges.

title: Topology coverage is incomplete
rationale: The graph contains topology resources but is missing one or more expected categories.
decisionsTaken: Compared present topology categories to expected coverage categories.
